dashboard.referralText: Invite 5 friends — when they go Premium with your code, you get 100% discount!

history.empty: No tests completed yet. Start your first test!

test.premiumTestDesc: This test is for premium users. Get premium to access all tests!

reading.title: Reading Tests
reading.subtitle: Academic reading practice · 3 passages · 40 questions · 60 minutes

listening.title: Listening Tests
listening.subtitle: Academic listening practice · Choose your mode below
listening.fullTestDesc: Complete IELTS Listening test with all 4 sections in one sitting
listening.trainingDesc: Practice one section at a time — focus on your weakest parts

script.title: Script Practice
script.cardDesc: Listen to the audio, type what you hear
script.listSubtitle: Listen to the audio, write down what you hear, and check your accuracy
script.noScripts: No scripts have been added yet.
script.instructions: Listen to the audio. Type what you hear into the box below. Click "Check" when you're done.
script.needsToPass: You need at least 70% accuracy to unlock the next script

mock.title: Mock IELTS Test
mock.subtitle: View upcoming sessions and book · 20,000 UZS
mock.noSessionsDesc: New sessions will appear here when added by admin.
mock.fiveMinWarning: You have 5 minutes to enter or session will be auto-cancelled.
mock.minutesElapsed: {n} minutes elapsed. If you don't enter within {remaining} minute(s), session will be auto-cancelled.
mock.autoResigned: Candidate was more than 5 minutes late and this session was automatically cancelled.
mock.infoItem1: After booking, admin confirms within 24 hours
mock.infoItem2: "Start Mock Test" button appears when test time comes
mock.infoItem3: Test: Listening (40 min) + Reading (60 min) + Writing (60 min)
mock.infoItem5: You have 5 minutes to enter after test starts. If not entered in time, session is auto-cancelled and payment is non-refundable.

testTaking.uploadHint: Upload a CDI file from the admin panel
testTaking.audioNotUploaded: Upload audio or a file from the admin panel
testTaking.listenAndAnswer: Listen to the audio and answer the questions
testTaking.submitBody: You have answered {answered} of {total} questions. This cannot be undone.
testTaking.audioNotSupported: Your browser does not support audio playback.

mockFlow.warningLast: Final warning! The next violation will cancel the test.
mockFlow.warningFirst: Switching windows was recorded. If it happens again, the test will be cancelled.
mockFlow.autoplayBlocked: Your browser did not allow audio to start automatically
mockFlow.audioOnceNotice: The audio plays once — you cannot go back
mockFlow.onlyPauseAvailable: Only the pause button is available · You cannot go back
mockFlow.autoAdvanceToReading: You'll move to Reading when time runs out
mockFlow.listeningEndedReadingStarted: The Listening section ended. Reading has started.
mockFlow.readingEndedWritingStarted: The Reading section ended. Writing has started.
mockFlow.disqualifiedTitle: 🚫 You have been removed from the test
mockFlow.disqualifiedBody: You were removed from the test due to a rule violation. Redirecting to Dashboard…
mockFlow.preStartInfo: After Listening ends, you'll get 2 minutes to check your answers. The test runs in fullscreen. Switching tabs or exiting fullscreen counts as a warning.
mockFlow.mockDoneBody: Your answers were submitted successfully. Results will be reviewed by admins soon.

games.title: 🎮 Word Game
games.limitModalBodySingular: You unlocked {limit} new level today. A new level unlocks tomorrow at 00:00 (Tashkent time).
games.limitModalBodyPlural: You unlocked {limit} new levels today. New levels unlock tomorrow at 00:00 (Tashkent time).
games.noQuestionsYet: Questions haven't been added for this level yet
games.scoreText: You answered {score} out of {total} questions correctly
games.failScoreText: You answered only {score} out of {total} questions correctly
games.thresholdText: You need at least {threshold} correct answers to move to the next level
games.star4: Great result! Just a bit more effort!
games.star2: Not bad, but could be better
games.star0: You passed. Try again for stars!
